arts.ttl: Portsmouth clash with Middlesbrough delayed due to medical incident
arts.sum: Pompey’s clash with Middlesbrough has been delayed today following a medical emergency.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth dealt setback ahead of Championship fixture against Middlesbrough
arts.sum: Pompey have been dealt a setback ahead of their Championship game against Middlesbrough today.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss makes 3 changes against Middlesbrough - with a maiden start for Newcastle loanee
arts.sum: John Mousinho has made three Pompey changes this afternoon - including a full debut for Isaac Hayden.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth owner Michael Eisner jets in for surprise Middlesbrough visit as January transfer chase continues
arts.sum: Pompey owner Michael Eisner has made a surprise visit to Fratton Park for today’s clash with Middlesbrough.

arts.ttl: LIVE Portsmouth v Middlesbrough: build-up, team news and live updates from Fratton
arts.sum: It’s matchday at Fratton Park as Pompey welcome Middlesbrough to PO4.

arts.ttl: Ryan Giles left out of Hull City squad as Middlesbrough transfer looms
arts.sum: Giles has had two tough seasons since his loan on Teesside came to an end, with his Luton Town move not working out, before a Hull switch also failed to help him recapture his Riverside highs. Giles did not travel with the Tigers to London, and Hull Live reports that his return to the club he previously played for on loan in the 2022/23 season is expected to be finalised next week.

arts.ttl: Is this Portsmouth's strongest XI and bench if John Mousinho's side reported clean bill of health for Championship run-in?
arts.sum: Pompey have had their fair share of injuries this season - we can all agree on that.

arts.ttl: Michael Carrick's promise as Middlesbrough have 'clear focus' ahead of Portsmouth
arts.sum: I’m really looking forward to it as it’s all ahead of us and we will attack it with everything we have got. Michael Carrick says Middlesbrough will attack the Championship run-in with everything they’ve got, as he challenged his players to use the potential rewards to fire them up for the final 20 games.

arts.ttl: Michael Carrick's Sammy Silvera Middlesbrough future insistance after Portsmouth loan struggles
arts.sum: Michael Carrick says Sammy Silvera can still have a future at Middlesbrough, despite his struggles on loan at Portsmouth in the first half of the season. He’s our player Sammy, and he did a lot of good things last season.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth v Middlesbrough injury and team news 12 out and 3 doubts
arts.sum: Pompey face Middlesbrough at Fratton Park in an EFL Championship match on Saturday, January 18.
